characters.name: Brutus
characters.description: BrutusBiographical InformationStatusAliveSpeciesAlienAppearancesActorRay Porter[Source] Brutusis a character onThe CW's superhero dramaNaomi. He is a powerful being who took overEarth-29and hunted downThe Twenty-Nineafter learning ofNaomi's existence. Brutus resentedthe Twenty-Nine, who's abilities manifested after a purple meteor shower hitEarth-29, but the tension remained manageable, that is until he discovered that two of the Twenty-Nine conceived achild, who Brutus believed could bring his reign to an end. So, he hunted the Twenty-Nine down. However, before he could capture the child, she was sent to another earth, in another universe. And Brutus has been searching for her ever since.[1]

characters.name: Dee
characters.description: DeeBiographical InformationStatusAliveSpeciesThanagarianOccupationTattoo parlor ownerAppearancesActorAlexander WraithFirst Appearance"Don't Believe Everything You Think"[Source] Darcovo, better known asDee, is a main character onThe CW's superhero dramaNaomi. He is portrayed byAlexander Wraith. Dee is the owner of a local tattoo parlor and a winged alien from the planetThanagar.[1]When a strange event leaves the town in chaos, Dee hints that he knows more than he is willing to tell.

characters.description: LourdesBiographical InformationStatusAliveAlias(es)ZatanaOccupationComic book store clerkRelationshipsRelativesUnnamed fatherAppearancesActorCamila MorenoFirst Appearance"Don't Believe Everything You Think"[Source] Lourdesis a main character onThe CW's superhero dramaNaomi. She is portrayed byCamila Moreno. Lourdes is a young woman with a sarcastic sense of humor who works in a vintage collectibles shop and has an unrequited crush onNaomi, with whom she shares an obsession with classic comics. She is also happy to join in on Naomi's schemes.

characters.name: Naomi McDuffie
characters.description: Naomi McDuffieBiographical InformationBorn2004StatusAliveSpeciesAlienOccupationStudent of Port Oswego High SchoolRelationshipsAffiliationPort Oswego High SchoolDebate ClubRelativesUnnamed(biological mother; deceased)Unnnamed(biological father; deceased)Jennifer McDuffie(adoptive mother)Greg McDuffie(adoptive father)AppearancesActorKaci WalfallFirst Appearance"Don't Believe Everything You Think"[Source] Naomi McDuffieis the titular character onThe CW's superhero dramaNaomi. She is portrayed byKaci Walfall. Naomi is an effortlessly cool and confident 16-years-old high school student. Popular throughout her military town, Naomi is unafraid to embrace her AP-student, six classes in total,[1]comic book–loving nerdiness. She runs the third most popularSupermanfan site in the world,[1]and when a supernatural event leads to the discovery of her hidden powers, Naomi pursues her mysterious destiny.

He is portrayed byDaniel Puig. Nathan is a high school jock who briefly datedNaomibefore she broke up with him and ended the relationship. While the two remain friends, they still share an undeniable chemistry, and Naomi's interest in another teen sparks Nathan's jealousy.

characters.name: Superman
characters.description: SupermanBiographical InformationStatusAliveSpeciesKryptonianAppearancesActorTyler HoechlinFirst Appearance"Don't Believe Everything You Think"[Source] Supermanis a character onThe CW's superhero dramaNaomi. Naomi McDuffie's first encounter with Superman occurs after getting a message fromAnnabelle, alerting her of his presence. However, on her way to the Square, Naomi becomes light-headed and passes out, but not before witnessing Superman fly over her.[1]
